headline: Expand Energy (NASDAQ:EXE) Reports Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Natural gas producer Expand Energy (NASDAQ:EXE) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 37% year on year to $4.4 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.83 per share was 5.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
